name: Apparatus Phase Drift
pitch: Coordinated scroll-driven horizontal wave undulating images on a traveling sinusoidal path.

lifecycle.idle: Images have a very subtle automatic time-based sine drift
lifecycle.discovery: Beginning scroll offsets first image from center reference line
lifecycle.buildUp: Consecutive images enter the viewport and propagate the wave
lifecycle.peak: Scroll velocity swells wave amplitude up to 80px
lifecycle.recovery: Scroll stops, wave dampens smoothly back to idle micro-motion
